## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] Smoke-tested with `pi -e ./packages/<name>` when behavior changed
- [ ] Package README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Version bump planned if this is a publishable change (or note "docs only")
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths in the diff
